leadText: Ice Body (Japanese: アイスボディ Ice Body) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During hail or snow , a Pokémon with Ice Body will regain 1 / 16 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn. A Pokémon with this Ability will take no damage from hail if it otherwise would. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Ice Body has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] During hail or snow , a Pokémon with Ice Body will regain 1 / 16 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn. A Pokémon with this Ability will take no damage from hail if it otherwise would.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Promotes natural HP recovery when it is hailing. B S L てんきが あられだと ＨＰの しぜんかいふくが はやい MD GtI Unavailable S MD It helps the Pokémon restore HP naturally when the weather is hail! MD RT DX This Ability helps the Pokémon restore HP naturally more quickly when the weather condition is Hail.
